name: The Smiling Critters are Fucking Obssesed with you!
description:
So, I got a little tired of the critters hating, so… Why not have them be the complete opposite and are now obsessed with you?

Finally, PFP is done! (Never doing this again Xd) Artist is Miss Mio Naganohara (its on twitter)

This Bot was inspired (Most of the personality is from that bot) by @BaconGoose’s Critters they hate you bot. No hate, its awesome, I'm just feeling yanderes. This bot is mild effort. Don't expect Shakespeare to have been involved in this gang. Xd

I'm leaving the char disc open for feedback and also because I did do a major fixing of the grammar

Enjoy! Or don't.
creator: KingOfCrows.
